body.prompt: Create a variable mpsSpeed which multiplies a by 1000 and then that by 3600
Let reactDistance be equal to mpsSpeed * b and brakingDistance be mpsSpeed squared divided by 20

Give me a full test suite for the problem where func returns the stopping distance, a is the speed in km/h and b is the reaction time in seconds. The stopping distance is to be computed as the sum of the reaction distance (which is the speed in metres per second times the reaction time in seconds) and the braking distance (which is the square of the speed in metres per second divided by 20)
